title: Vocational School of Health Services
content:
Vocational School of Health Services

Audiometry

MENU

The main goal of the audiometry program is to train experienced healthcare staff who can apply hearing and balance scales and use technical English skills, to work in the field of hearing and hearing loss evaluation. The students of these programs will also be able to follow technological changes in the area and may have special oral communication skills.

Students who graduate from this department can work in audiology clinics or otorhinolaryngology departments of hospitals under the supervision of a specialist. They may apply the scales that related to balance system and also work in schools for the hearing-impaired and hearing aid companies.

Period of Education

2 years

Prep School:

Optional

Hospital Practice:

Yes

Hospital Internship:

Yes

Education Language:

Turkish
